_comment: Curated AI-tools + MCP-servers directory, organized by creator/AI-architect SUPERPOWER (use case). Source of truth for the /superpowers surface + the best-ai-superpowers-stack article. Researched + web-verified June 2026. 'best' = top pick. affiliate = tool maps to data/affiliate/programs.json (recurring payer). Re-verify terms before relying.
note: Two easy mis-shelvings: sandcastles.ai = research/ideation (NOT a generator); qme.ai = an MCP memory connector (NOT a tool you 'use' standalone). Cursor has a ~40-tool MCP ceiling — curate MCPs per project, never load all 15 at once.

tools.name: Opus Clip
tools.for: long video → social shorts (auto moments + captions + reframe)

mcp.name: Notion MCP
mcp.unlocks: semantic search + write to your content workspace

tools.name: Lovable
tools.for: non-tech full SaaS MVP (Supabase + auth + GitHub sync)

mcp.name: Vercel MCP
mcp.unlocks: deployments, env vars, build logs, create projects

superpowers.label: Research & knowledge

tools.name: Perplexity (Deep Research)
tools.for: real-time web discovery, current data, speed

tools.name: NotebookLM
tools.for: deep analysis of YOUR uploaded docs; audio/video overviews

tools.name: sandcastles.ai
tools.for: short-form video OUTLIER mining + script ideation (research, not generation)

mcp.name: Brave Search MCP
mcp.unlocks: independent web index, no Google tracking

mcp.name: Fetch MCP
mcp.unlocks: pull any URL → markdown into context

superpowers.proMove: Chain Perplexity (discover) → NotebookLM (ground) → Claude (reason) for 3–5× more reliable research than any single tool.

tools.name: Nano Banana Pro / NB2 (Gemini 3 Pro Image)
Higgsfield
tools.for: access layer — 30+ models in one place + Soul ID character identity

tools.name: Seedance 2.0
tools.for: build from your own image/video/audio refs

tools.name: Suno (v4.5+)
tools.for: full songs, vocals, commercial quality, broadest genre control

tools.name: n8n
tools.for: self-host, dev-grade, ~70 AI/LangChain nodes — the agent action backend

mcp.name: n8n MCP Server Trigger
mcp.unlocks: expose any workflow as a callable agent tool — separates reasoning (LLM) from action (workflows)

mcp.name: Composio
mcp.unlocks: one connector → thousands of app tools

tools.name: Cursor
tools.for: IDE-native (~40-tool MCP ceiling — curate per project)

tools.name: Codex / Antigravity
tools.for: OpenAI stack / Google's agent-first dev platform

superpowers.label: Voice / audio

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.for: the voice engine — TTS, cloning, dubbing, conversational agents, dev API

tools.name: Descript
tools.for: fastest record → publish; text-based editing, captions, clips

superpowers.rule: ElevenLabs if you're buying a voice; Descript if you're buying an editing workflow.

tools.name: qme.ai
tools.for: MCP connector — drop a video/link/voice-note in Claude → it watches + stores in a compounding 2nd brain. Overlaps FrankX VIS + SIS/AgentDB.

mcp.name: Qme AI MCP
mcp.unlocks: multimodal capture + persistent creative memory inside Claude

mustKnowMcp.name: Postgres / Supabase
mustKnowMcp.unlocks: query + manage your DB from the agent

mustKnowMcp.name: Stripe
mustKnowMcp.unlocks: customers, subs, invoices, payment links (remote OAuth)

mustKnowMcp.name: Figma
mustKnowMcp.unlocks: Dev-Mode design context, tokens, FigJam diagrams

mustKnowMcp.name: n8n (Server Trigger)
mustKnowMcp.unlocks: expose any workflow as an agent tool
